从牌组选择 1 张党争迷局并立即打出。
gwentAbility: Pick an Impenetrable Fog card from your deck and play it instantly.

abilityText: 清除场上全部时局效果。
gwentCardName: Foltest: Lord Commander of the North
gwentAbility: Clear any weather effects in play.
Doubles the strength of all your Siege units unless a Commander's Horn is also present.

abilityText: 摧毁对方文脉线最强人物。
gwentAbility: Destroy your enemy strongest Siege unit if the combined strength is 10 or more.

abilityText: 摧毁对方朝堂线最强人物。
gwentAbility: Destroy your enemy strongest Ranged unit if the combined strength is 10 or more.

abilityText: 侦察对手随机 3 张手牌。
gwentCardName: Emhyr var Emreis: Emperor of Nilfgaard
gwentAbility: Look at 3 random cards from your opponent's hand.

abilityText: 从牌组选择 1 张典籍散佚并立即打出。
gwentCardName: Emhyr var Emreis: His Imperial Majesty
gwentAbility: Pick a Torrential Rain card from your deck and play it instantly.

abilityText: 双方济世复归改为随机目标。
gwentCardName: Emhyr var Emreis: Invader of the North
gwentAbility: Abilities that restore a unit from the discard pile restore a randomly-chosen unit.

abilityText: 从对手弃牌堆取回 1 张人物到手牌。
gwentAbility: Draw a card from your opponent's discard pile.

gwentCardName: Emhyr var Emreis: The White Flame
Francesca Findabair: Daisy of the Valley
gwentAbility: Draw an extra card at the beginning of the battle.

abilityText: 将己方通才人物移动到更优战线。
gwentCardName: Francesca Findabair: Hope of the Aen Seidhe
gwentAbility: Move agile units to whatever valid row maximizes their strength.

abilityText: 从牌组选择 1 张边患四起并立即打出。
gwentAbility: Pick a Biting Frost card from your deck and play it instantly.

abilityText: 摧毁对方疆场线最强人物。
gwentCardName: Francesca Findabair: Queen of Dol Blathanna
gwentAbility: Destroy your enemy strongest Close Combat unit if the combined strength is 10 or more.
Doubles the strength of all your Ranged units unless a Commander's Horn is also present.

abilityText: 双方出使人物战力翻倍。
gwentAbility: Doubles the strength of all Spy cards on both sides.

abilityText: 从己方弃牌堆取回 1 张人物到手牌。
gwentAbility: Restore a card from your discard pile to your hand.

gwentCardName: Eredin: Commander of the Red Riders
gwentAbility: Doubles the strength of all your Close Combat units unless a Commander's Horn is also present.

abilityText: 弃置 2 张手牌并抽 1 张牌。
gwentAbility: Discard 2 cards then draw a card of your choice.

abilityText: 从牌组选择任意 1 张时局牌并立即打出。
gwentCardName: Eredin: King of the Wild Hunt
gwentAbility: Pick any weather card from your deck and play it instantly.

abilityText: 双方弃牌堆洗回各自牌库。
gwentAbility: Shuffle all cards from each player graveyard back into their decks.

abilityText: 己方单位在恶劣时局下仅损失一半战力。
gwentAbility: Units lose only half their strength during bad weather.
